_note: Balancer V2 ComposableStable LIVE-state reads the on-chain solver replays into a StableMath quote ladder (segKind 6). getPoolTokenInfo(bytes32,address) targets the canonical Vault singleton (cfg[11]) and returns FOUR SCALARS (cash, managed, lastChangeBlock, assetManager) — the pool balance is cash+managed; this is the v12-safe scalar path (Vault.getPoolTokens nests the balances dyn array in a tuple and decodes to garbage on v12). getScalingFactors targets the POOL and is a BARE uint256[] aligned with the FULL registered token list (incl. the BPT) — it must be INLINE-INDEXED ([regPos], variable index proven on both engines) and NEVER stored in a var. getAmplificationParameter (=A*AMP_PRECISION) and getSwapFeePercentage target the POOL. The poolId is passed to getPoolTokenInfo as a Uint256 (encoded verbatim to 32 bytes = the bytes32); the ABI input MUST be typed bytes32 so the compiler computes the getPoolTokenInfo(bytes32,address) selector. One combined ABI so a single import can .at() the Vault and the pool.
